subject: data(projects): trim displayed projects to Graphiki, CanvaGrid, SyncTone, FuelHunt
body:
Remove model-pear, Sancio, Four Ems, budgy-ting, and repo-tor from the
Projects section. Focuses the list on a smaller, higher-signal showcase.
Note: repo-tor embed charts (ActivityCharts) are unaffected — that feature
lives independently of the projects array.

Tags: data, content
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: projects-list-curation
Semver: patch
